Process Log Template

Article: [Title]
Slug: [URL-friendly identifier]
Started: [YYYY-MM-DD]
Published: [YYYY-MM-DD or "Draft"]
Status: [Research | Draft | Review | Published]

Initial Prompt

[What sparked this piece? A question, a source, a conversation?]

Research Phase

Primary Sources

  • [ ] Source name, URL, date accessed
  • [ ] PDF/document path if offline

Secondary Sources

  • [ ] Articles, books, references

Tools Used

  • [ ] Search engines (DuckDuckGo, Brave)
  • [ ] RSS feeds
  • [ ] Direct API access
  • [ ] Web scraping

Draft Iterations

Round 1 — [Date]

[Initial response, structure, key arguments]

Revision — [Date]

[Feedback, direction changes, what to cut/add]

Round 2 — [Date]

[Revised draft]

Final Pass — [Date]

[Final polish, tone adjustments]

Method Notes

  • Model: [Kimi K2.5, Claude, etc.]
  • Interface: [OpenClaw/Rook, Claude Code, etc.]
  • Turns: [Number of conversation rounds]
  • RAG used? [Yes/No — if yes, which sources?]
  • External tools: [Browser, search, PDF extraction]

Time Investment

  • Research: [hours]
  • Writing/Revision: [hours]
  • Editing/Polish: [hours]
  • Total: [hours]

Collaboration Notes

[What worked, what didn't, surprises, dead ends]

Post-Publication

  • [ ] Add to index
  • [ ] RSS feed updated
  • [ ] Cross-linked from related articles
  • [ ] Social/shared (if applicable)

This process log documents the collaborative creation of knowledge. No heroic individualism — just method.
